drift_simulation_method: baseline_poisoning: inject calibration-split attack feature vectors as normal-labeled training samples, re-fit IsolationForest, re-evaluate on holdout (eval_seed=1337)
overall_verdict: DETECTED — Model correctly detected brute_force_auth at all drift fractions tested (['10%', '25%', '50%']). Note: this is a synthetic drift simulation, not a real deployment test.
limitation_note: SyntheticAttackService has no native gradual-drift API (confirmed in Phase 6 dependency check). Drift is simulated by injecting attack feature vectors into the training data under normal labels (baseline poisoning), then re-training.
